DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CARONA ENGINEERS INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. PROOF OF SERVICE DOES NOT INDICATE TO WHOM AND WHERE PAPERS WERE SERVED. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
